scope: custom: core_engine + combat + derived_stats -- R1 corrected-model resolution atom (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: The single-Action sigma-leverage resolution the combat armature hangs on. Demoted, Agility-INDEPENDENT, History-driven resolution pool (closes the C-04 channel the M8b re-sweep pinned: Agi->bigger pool->base-rate dominance; M8b recommended compressing the pool spread). Agility moves to a sigma-leverage tempo delta-sigma (uniform impact). Reuses the verified M1 engine (eff_ob/soft_cap/p_success/roll) and the M5 levers. Canonical degree band; a crit is an Overwhelming-degree strike, not a random roll; magnitude=net-Ob is the 'how well struck' gauge for downstream wound severity. Class A = canonical (params/core.md degree table + Ob/pool floors; modifier_system_spec state-gating). Class C = PROPOSED armature redesign (demoted-pool base, Agi-as-leverage magnitude); sim-tunable, NOT canonical; the values the equal-budget Agi/Str/End parity sweep exists to tune. Does NOT edit canon; presented as proposal for Jordan ratification (decision A: History-driven vs flat base). sigma-space level magnitudes + soft cap imported from M1 (Class B there).

entries.quoted_text: Ob minimum: 1. No modifier may reduce Ob below 1. (PP-232)
Combat Pool | (Agility x 2) + weapon History (points + 3) | min 5
Overwhelming | Net >= 2x Ob AND net >= 3 (+1 Momentum)
Overwhelming requires a minimum of 3 net successes regardless of Ob. (PP-232)
Advancement max: 7. Recall (Rec) ... sets the per-History point cap — a History can never hold more points than the character's Recall score (so History points <= 7).

entries.value: per-state live delta-sigma source sets (live counts 5/6/6/4)
entries.quoted_text: LIVE COUNT: Out-of-contact 5, Closing 6, In-bind 6, Breaking 4. Stance Counter live Closing only; Reaction Closing+In-bind; Reading Out/Closing/In-bind; Set bonus + Weapon phase-strength all states; Perception/Facing Out/Closing/Breaking; Tactile+Grip In-bind only; Approach Out-of-contact; Disengage Breaking.

bottleneck MOVED from weapon-category/damage (M8) to COMBAT POOL SIZE (M2 Agi x2 + History) -- the d10 S-curve compounds a pool-size edge. Recommended next lever: compress the Combat Pool spread before re-tuning damage.

entries.class: C-proposed (armature redesign; NOT canonical; sim-tunable parity knob)
entries.quoted_text: compress the Combat Pool spread -- i.e. move attribute differentiation off raw pool size. Defined as LEVEL_SIGMA[minor]/2 = 0.125. Agility is re-expressed as a sigma-leverage tempo delta-sigma (uniform impact across pool size, per modifier_system_spec §2.1), magnitude tuned in the equal-budget Agi/Str/End parity sweep.
